channel.title: SAML on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in SAML on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecurityX (CAS-005): Security Engineering
item.category: "CompTIA SecurityX Course" , "Security Engineering" , "Cryptography" , "Hardware Security" , "Endpoint Security" , "OT Security" , "Automation" , "CASP+" , "Enterprise Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security engineering for the CompTIA SecurityX CAS-005 exam. Learn IAM troubleshooting, endpoint and server security, hardware roots of trust, OT/ICS security, automation, and advanced cryptography.
